## Context

How are you evaluating or using `star`?

## What Worked

What was clear or useful?

## What Blocked You

What slowed adoption, caused confusion, or reduced confidence?

## Suggested Improvements

What would make adoption easier?

## Additional Notes

Anything else maintainers should know.
